steps.title: Find the scope signal
steps.content: The opening phrase, “Women like Grace Murray Hopper,” signals through its plural structure and use of “like” that the topic is women in cryptology (as a group), not Hopper as an individual.

steps.title: Match to the answers
steps.content: Choice A directly names the main topic: women in the field of cryptology. B and C focus on subjects the passage doesn't address, while D treats a single supporting example as the main focus. That matches choice A — A is correct.
